pet.name: Mochi
pet.special_needs: Senior dog with stiff joints. Needs short low-impact exercise, hydration monitoring, and calm enrichment.
pet.characteristics: Calm senior dog, lower energy, friendly with people, gets tired from long walks.

age_context.summary: Mochi is estimated to be in the senior stage. A typical lifespan for this species is approximated at 10-15 years.

extra_context: Create a complete pet care plan for a senior dog with daily comfort checks, weekly maintenance, monthly reminders, and safe condition-aware guidance.

retrieved_passages.title: Senior Pet Support
retrieved_passages.content: Senior pets often need lower-impact exercise, more frequent comfort checks, and closer observation of appetite, hydration, and mobility. Shorter walks, joint-friendly movement, and calm enrichment are often easier to tolerate than intense activity.

retrieved_passages.title: Enrichment and Daily Monitoring
retrieved_passages.content: Observation tasks are useful for special-needs pets because they create a record of appetite, water intake, energy, and bathroom habits. These tasks should be short, specific, and easy to complete consistently.

retrieved_passages.title: Puppy and Kitten Routine Basics
retrieved_passages.content: Exercise and enrichment for very young pets should stay short and positive. Puppies often do better with several brief walks or training moments instead of one long outing, and kittens benefit from short interactive play sessions that stop before exhaustion.

retrieved_passages.title: Puppy and Kitten Routine Basics
retrieved_passages.content: Young pets benefit from short, predictable care blocks spread throughout the day. Frequent feeding, hydration checks, short play sessions, and bathroom or litter monitoring help establish routine without overwhelming the pet.

retrieved_passages.title: Enrichment and Daily Monitoring
retrieved_passages.content: Daily care plans are stronger when they combine essential care with realistic enrichment and observation. Short play, sniff walks, brushing, or calm interaction can improve quality of life without requiring large blocks of time.

raw_recommendations.name: Morning Comfort Check
raw_recommendations.notes: Observe Mochi's mobility, appetite, and overall demeanor. Note any stiffness, reluctance to move, or changes in behavior.
raw_recommendations.rationale: Senior pets need frequent comfort checks to monitor mobility and detect early signs of discomfort. This quick observation establishes a baseline for Mochi's daily condition.

raw_recommendations.name: Hydration Monitoring
raw_recommendations.notes: Check water bowl level and encourage Mochi to drink. Record water intake if possible to track hydration patterns.
raw_recommendations.rationale: Senior pets require closer observation of hydration. Regular monitoring helps prevent dehydration-related complications common in older dogs.

raw_recommendations.name: Short Low-Impact Walk
raw_recommendations.notes: Gentle, slow-paced walk on flat terrain. Stop if Mochi shows signs of fatigue or joint discomfort. Focus on comfort over distance.
raw_recommendations.rationale: Senior dogs with stiff joints benefit from shorter, low-impact exercise rather than long walks. Multiple brief outings are better tolerated than one intense session.

raw_recommendations.name: Afternoon Enrichment Session
raw_recommendations.notes: Offer calm enrichment such as gentle sniff walks indoors, slow-paced interactive play, or quiet puzzle feeding. Keep activity gentle and stop before exhaustion.
raw_recommendations.rationale: Calm enrichment improves quality of life for senior pets without requiring intense activity. Short, predictable enrichment blocks support mental stimulation and routine.

raw_recommendations.name: Evening Appetite & Bathroom Check
raw_recommendations.notes: Observe Mochi's appetite at mealtime and note bathroom habits. Record any changes in eating patterns or digestive issues.
raw_recommendations.rationale: Tracking appetite and bathroom habits creates a health record for senior pets and helps detect early signs of illness or discomfort.

raw_recommendations.name: Weekly Joint Mobility Assessment
raw_recommendations.notes: Gently observe Mochi's movement patterns, gait, and any signs of stiffness. Note improvements or declines in mobility compared to previous weeks.
raw_recommendations.rationale: Regular mobility assessment helps track joint health in senior dogs and informs whether adjustments to exercise or comfort measures are needed.

raw_recommendations.name: Weekly Grooming & Comfort Care
raw_recommendations.notes: Gentle brushing, nail check, and inspection of paws and skin. This also provides bonding time and allows you to feel for any lumps or tender areas.
raw_recommendations.rationale: Regular grooming and tactile inspection support senior pet comfort and allow early detection of skin, nail, or other physical changes.

raw_recommendations.name: Monthly Health & Wellness Review
raw_recommendations.notes: Review all observations from the past month: mobility trends, appetite patterns, hydration, energy levels, and any behavioral changes. Note items to discuss with veterinarian.
raw_recommendations.rationale: Monthly reviews consolidate daily observations into a comprehensive health picture for senior pets, supporting proactive care and informed veterinary discussions.
